lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਭਈ ਤੰਤੀ ਤੂਟਸਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਨਹਦ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਬਾਜੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: thir bhee tantee toottas naahee anahad kinguree baajee |3|
lines.english: The string has become steady, and it does not break; this guitar vibrates with the unstruck melody. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਮਗਨ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਡੋਲ ਨ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: sun man magan bhe hai poore maaeaa ddol na laagee |
lines.english: Hearing it, the mind is enraptured and becomes perfect; it does not waver, and it is not affected by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਖੇਲਿ ਗਇਓ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ॥੪॥੨॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer taa kau punarap janam nahee khel geo bairaagee |4|2|53|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, the bairaagee, the renunciate, who has played such a game, is not reincarnated again into the world of form and substance. ||4||2||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਜ ਨਵ ਗਜ ਦਸ ਗਜ ਇਕੀਸ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਏਕ ਤਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gaj nav gaj das gaj ikees pureea ek tanaaee |
lines.english: Nine yards, ten yards, and twenty-one yards - weave these into the full piece of cloth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਠ ਸੂਤ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਬਹਤਰਿ ਪਾਟੁ ਲਗੋ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saatth soot nav khandd bahatar paatt lago adhikaaee |1|
lines.english: take the sixty threads and add nine joints to the seventy-two on the loom. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਜੀ ਨ ਮਿਨੀਐ ਤੋਲਿ ਨ ਤੁਲੀਐ ਪਾਚਨੁ ਸੇਰ ਅਢਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gajee na mineeai tol na tuleeai paachan ser adtaaee |
lines.english: This cloth cannot be measured in yards or weighed with weights; its food is two and a half measures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਛੋਡਿਐ ਜਾਇ ਜੁਲਾਹੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghar chhoddiai jaae julaaho |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Leaving her home, the soul goes to the world of the weaver. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਈ ਬੁਨਾਵਨ ਮਾਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: gee bunaavan maaho |
lines.english: Life weaves itself into its patterns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨ ਕੀ ਬੈਠ ਖਸਮ ਕੀ ਬਰਕਸ ਇਹ ਬੇਲਾ ਕਤ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: din kee baitth khasam kee barakas ih belaa kat aaee |
lines.english: How many days will you sit here, in opposition to your Lord and Master? When will this opportunity come again?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੌ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਚਨੁ ਬੇਗਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਝਗਰੁ ਕਰੈ ਘਰਹਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jau kar paachan beg na paavai jhagar karai gharahaaee |2|
lines.english: If it does not obtain food right away, it quarrels with the master of the house. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਛੀ ਨਲੀ ਤੰਤੁ ਨਹੀ ਨਿਕਸੈ ਨਤਰ ਰਹੀ ਉਰਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: chhochhee nalee tant nahee nikasai natar rahee urajhaaee |
lines.english: The wind-pipe is empty now; the thread of the breath does not come out any longer. The thread is tangled; it has run out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੂਟੇ ਕੂੰਡੇ ਭੀਗੈ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਚਲਿਓ ਜੁਲਾਹੋ ਰੀਸਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chhootte koondde bheegai pureea chalio julaaho reesaaee |3|
lines.english: Leaving his pots and pans, and the bobbins wet with his tears, the weaver soul departs in jealous anger. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਪਸਾਰੁ ਈਹਾ ਰਹੁ ਬਪੁਰੀ ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਸਮਝਾਈ ॥੪॥੩॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: chhodd pasaar eehaa rahu bapuree kahu kabeer samajhaaee |4|3|54|
lines.english: So renounce the world of form and substance while you remain here, O poor soul; says Kabeer: you must understand this! ||4||3||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਜੋਤਿ ਏਕਾ ਮਿਲੀ ਕਿੰਬਾ ਹੋਇ ਮਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ek jot ekaa milee kinbaa hoe mahoe |
lines.english: When one light merges into another, what becomes of it then?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਫੂਟਿ ਮਰੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jit ghatt naam na aoopajai foott marai jan soe |1|
lines.english: That person, within whose heart the Lord's Name does not well up - may that person burst and die! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਲ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਰਾਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: saaval sundar raameea |
lines.english: O my dark and beautiful Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਤੋਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man laagaa tohi |1| rahaau |
lines.english: my mind is attached to You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਿਧਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਿ ਏਹੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਕਿ ਭੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh milai sidh paaeeai ki ehu jog ki bhog |
lines.english: Meeting with the Holy, the perfection of the Siddhas is obtained. What good is Yoga or indulgence in pleasures?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: duhu mil kaaraj aoopajai raam naam sanjog |2|
lines.english: When the two meet together, the business is conducted, and the link with the Lord's Name is established. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਗੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਇਹੁ ਗੀਤੁ ਹੈ ਇਹੁ ਤਉ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: log jaanai ihu geet hai ihu tau braham beechaar |
lines.english: People believe that this is just a song, but it is a meditation on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਸੰਸਾ ਨਹੀ ਅੰਤਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੪॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer sansaa nahee ant param gat paae |4|1|4|55|
lines.english: - says Kabeer, without a doubt, in the end, he obtains the highest status. ||4||1||4||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕਾਸੀ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਮਾਨਸ ਮਰਤੀ ਬਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau kaasee upades hoe maanas maratee baar |3|
lines.english: It is like the instructions given to the dying man at Benares. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸੁਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: koee gaavai ko sunai har naamaa chit laae |
lines.english: Whoever sings or listens to the Lord's Name with conscious awareness

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਤ ਤੇ ਡੂਬੇ ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਤਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jete jatan karat te ddoobe bhav saagar nahee taario re |
lines.english: Those who try to do things by their own efforts are drowned in the terrifying world-ocean; they cannot cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸ ਗ੍ਰਾਸ ਕੋ ਦਾਤੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: saas graas ko daato tthaakur so kiau manahu bisaario re |
lines.english: Your Lord and Master has given you the breath of life and food to sustain you; Oh, why have you forgotten Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਕਰਤੇ ਬਹੁ ਸੰਜਮ ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਮਨੁ ਜਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karam dharam karate bahu sanjam ahanbudh man jaario re |1|
lines.english: Those who practice religious rituals and strict self-discipline - their egotistical pride shall consume their minds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰਾ ਲਾਲੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲੈ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: heeraa laal amol janam hai kauddee badalai haario re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Human birth is a priceless jewel, which has been squandered in exchange for a worthless shell. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨਮਤ ਮਾਨ ਹਿਰਿਓ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aunamat maan hirio man maahee gur kaa sabad na dhaario re |2|
lines.english: Intoxicated with pride, you cheat yourself; you have not enshrined the Word of the Guru's Shabad within your mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਖਾ ਭੂਖ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa trikhaa bhookh bhram laagee hiradai naeh beechaario re |
lines.english: The thirst of desire and the hunger of doubt afflict you; you do not contemplate the Lord in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਆਦ ਲੁਭਤ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਰਸ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿਓ ਮਦ ਰਸ ਲੈਤ ਬਿਕਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: suaad lubhat indree ras prerio mad ras lait bikaario re |
lines.english: Those who are deluded by sensual pleasures, who are tempted by sexual delights and enjoy wine are corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਭਾਗ ਸੰਤਨ ਸੰਗਾਨੇ ਕਾਸਟ ਲੋਹ ਉਧਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karam bhaag santan sangaane kaasatt loh udhaario re |3|
lines.english: But those who, through destiny and good karma, join the Society of the Saints, float over the ocean, like iron attached to wood. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤ ਜੋਨਿ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਅਬ ਦੁਖ ਕਰਿ ਹਮ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat jon janam bhram thaake ab dukh kar ham haario re |
lines.english: I have wandered in doubt and confusion, through birth and reincarnation; now, I am so tired. I am suffering in pain and wasting away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਤ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੪॥੧॥੫॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer gur milat mahaa ras prem bhagat nisataario re |4|1|5|56|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, meeting with the Guru, I have obtained supreme joy; my love and devotion have saved me. ||4||1||5||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲਬੂਤ ਕੀ ਹਸਤਨੀ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਚਲਤੁ ਰਚਿਓ ਜਗਦੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: kaalaboot kee hasatanee man bauraa re chalat rachio jagadees |
lines.english: Like the straw figure of a female elephant, fashioned to trap the bull elephant, O crazy mind, the Lord of the Universe has staged the drama of this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਸੁਆਇ ਗਜ ਬਸਿ ਪਰੇ ਮਨ ਬਉਰਾ ਰੇ ਅੰਕਸੁ ਸਹਿਓ ਸੀਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaam suaae gaj bas pare man bauraa re ankas sahio sees |1|
lines.english: Attracted by the lure of sexual desire, the elephant is captured, O crazy mind, and now the halter is placed around its neck. ||1||
